channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Opposite Dean Close School, 1st April
item.description:
The vehicle has been there since Sunday 29th March 2026. Is on Hatherley Road (stoping the traffic coming and going) at the back of the hockey pitches. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Manse Gardens, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping on road next to 127 Alstone Lane., 1st April
item.description:
What 3 Words: shady.deck.breath Appears to be fly tipping on access road next to 127 Alstone Lane. Don’t know how long been there or who it belongs to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Arle Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The double yellow lines on Priors Road both sides of the junction with Hillview Rd are very faded, 1st April
item.description:
The double yellow lines on Priors Road both sides of the junction with Hillview Rd are very faded to the point of being invisible. As a result vehicles are parking too close to the junction (not realising there are double yellow lines) making it dangerous for vehicles exiting Hillview Road onto Priors Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Priors Road, Whaddon, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet
